verdict_reason: One-line addition of the servicebus profile to ALL_PROFILES is correct and consistent with the profile-gated emulator services in infrastructure.compose.yml and the ALL_PROFILES loops in stop-stack.sh/bounce-backend.sh; only issue is stale --profile help text in flags.sh and AGENTS.md (Minor).

todos.issue: ALL_PROFILES gains a sixth profile (servicebus) but the --profile docs were not updated: scripts/stack/lib/flags.sh usage still says 'Valid: database, infrastructure, stubs, backend, frontend. Defaults to all five.' and docker/stack/AGENTS.md line 67 says the same, so users cannot discover --profile servicebus from --help
todos.fix: Add servicebus to the valid-profile list and change 'all five' to 'all six' in both the flags.sh usage() text and the AGENTS.md '--profile semantics' section
